Suchiate – All Natural – Hibiscus Flowers – 16 oz – Authentic Mexican Jamaica –Agua Fresca, Agua de Jamaica Tradicional – Hibiscus Tea – 

KEEPING OUR TRADITIONS – We are proud to bring Authentic Mexican Jamaica to families across the world; to pass on our traditions and share it with the ones you love the most. 

100% NATURAL – Suchiate’s Hibiscus (Jamaica) Flowers are natural dried flowers, free of colorants or added flavors, non-GMO.

EASY TO STORE – Store in a cool, dry place.

Agua de Jamaica Tradicional

(Traditional Mexican Hibiscus Tea)

Ingredients:

- 2 cups of Mexican dried hibiscus flowers

- 2 quarts of water 

- Sugar.

Instructions:

1.- Add 2 cups of dried hibiscus flowers to 4 cups of water

2.- Bring to a boil,  reduce heat to low and 

let it simmer for 10 minutes. 

3.-Remove from heat.  Cover and let sit for 20 minutes.

4.-Strain into a pitcher.

5.-Add remaining 4 cups of water and sugar to taste.

5.-Serve chilled over ice. 

Enjoy it!

INGREDIENTS:

DRIED HIBISCUS FLOWERS
